title: TraineeTypeCodeList
enumNames: A worker trainee that works for a short-term period to gain experience in a specific field. Typically for students or recent graduates, often tied to school credit or career exploration. The trainee may be paid or unpaid.

A worker trainee that works for a short-term, observation-based experience, usually unpaid and often based on academic credit. Externships are typically short-term and more focused on observation of professionals at work to gain insight into a career or industry.
A worker trainee enrolled in a structured, often paid, program to learn a trade or skill. Employment is tied to training, often with the intention to prepare for permanent employment.
